---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

**Why**
The problem it solves or the use case it enables.

**Platform**
Does this apply to macOS, Windows, or both? (Remember: behavior should stay in sync
across platforms — see WINDOWS-PORT-SPEC.md.)
